changes.motivation: Remove PostHog analytics telemetry from the CLI to eliminate user tracking and the posthog-node dependency.
changes.summary: Deleted src/util/posthog/tracking.ts (PostHog client module). Removed the `track` field and `phClient` import from PanfactumBaseContext in context.ts. Removed PostHog import, CLI-start capture call, and shutdown call from index.ts. Removed all groupIdentify/capture/flush tracking calls from welcome/command.ts. Removed posthog-node from package.json dependencies. Regenerated bun.lock and bun.nix via bun install, which also removed the transitive axios dependency brought in by posthog-node.
